title: Internal Server Error
detail:

[SQL: INSERT INTO walk_list_canvassers (walk_list_id, user_id, assigned_at) VALUES ($1::UUID, $2::VARCHAR, $3::TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE)]
